PreToolUse.command: python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); name=data.get('tool_name',''); inp=json.dumps(data.get('tool_input',{})); result={'continue':True}; (result.update({'systemMessage':'⚠️ You are editing an interrupt handler or ISR file. Ensure all changes follow embedded_cpp_best_practices: keep ISRs short, use volatile for shared variables, use atomics or critical sections for shared data.'}) if any(k in inp.lower() for k in ['irq','isr','interrupt','_handler','stm32f4xx_it']) else None); print(json.dumps(result))"
PreToolUse.windows: python -c "import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); name=data.get('tool_name',''); inp=json.dumps(data.get('tool_input',{})); result={'continue':True}; (result.update({'systemMessage':'⚠️ You are editing an interrupt handler or ISR file. Ensure all changes follow embedded_cpp_best_practices: keep ISRs short, use volatile for shared variables, use atomics or critical sections for shared data.'}) if any(k in inp.lower() for k in ['irq','isr','interrupt','_handler','stm32f4xx_it']) else None); print(json.dumps(result))"
